raw_consumer_statement: I was fraudulently charged for XXXX subscription in XXXX on my Citi card. I do not use any of XXXX 's services. Two ( positive ) charges were made. I disputed both. Citi only reversed one ( negative charge ). I have asked them repeatedly to review and they refuse to address it. Every time I send an inquiry they take two weeks to send a letter that says they already addressed the issue. The amount still in dispute is {$84.00}.
